movie.synopsis: Sookshamadarshini (2024) Sokshmadarshini (2024) Manuel returns with his mother to their former home in a middle-class neighbourhood. Suspicious of his intentions, Priyadarshini and her friends begin gathering clues, convinced he may be hiding something sinister.
